pilot.name: Blueprint uses Blueprint to sell Blueprint
pilot.paidScaleDecision: No paid spend, influencer spend, or acquisition ads until this ledger records organic replies, hosted-review starts, or qualified calls from the Exact-Site Hosted Review wedge.

targets.workflowNeed: Inspect a grocery-style public aisle loop before deciding whether a more specific retail capture would be useful.
intentSignals: Company publicly sells retail shelf-intelligence robots that operate in grocery and store aisles.

evidence.summary: Public product positioning indicates a retail-aisle robot workflow where exact-site hosted review could be a relevant first artifact.
evidence.notes: No recipient-backed contact has been recorded yet.

targets.buyerSegment: Retail and commercial service robotics team
targets.workflowNeed: Review a public-facing store route as a proxy for commercial-service robot perception and operations questions.
intentSignals: Company publicly presents autonomous robots for commercial spaces including retail environments.

evidence.summary: Public positioning indicates commercial-service robot workflows in customer-facing spaces where public-capture review can be relevant.
evidence.notes: No recipient-backed contact has been recorded yet.
